details.IncidentDetail: "[11] [Appended, 19:29:55] [3] THE DEVR IS OUT OF HIS VEH"
"[9] [Appended, 19:29:55] [1] A HONDA WENT INTO GUARDRAIL ON A BRIDGE AND ROLLED "
"[4] VEH WENT WAY OFF RH S"
"[6] PER PM -- CLOSURE SIGN IS IN LN MONROE JSO I10 **"
"[4] MONROE ONR TO WB I10 WILL BE CLOSED "
"[3] #1 LN IS THE ONLY LANE OPEN FROM GOLF CENTER TO MONROE ***"
"[2] LANES WILL BE CLOSED ON THE 74 BTWN PINYON AND BIG HORN FOR APPROX 3 TO 4 HOURS "
